title: Configuration
summary: Complete reference for all Hermes configuration settings including terminal backends, compression, TTS, display, web search backends, security, approvals, and context files.

env_vars.name: TERMINAL_SSH_HOST
env_vars.purpose: SSH hostname for SSH terminal backend

env_vars.name: TERMINAL_SSH_USER
env_vars.purpose: SSH username for SSH terminal backend

env_vars.name: TERMINAL_SSH_PORT
env_vars.purpose: SSH port for SSH backend

env_vars.name: TERMINAL_SSH_KEY
env_vars.purpose: Path to SSH private key

env_vars.name: MODAL_TOKEN_ID
env_vars.purpose: Modal cloud token ID for Modal terminal backend

env_vars.name: MODAL_TOKEN_SECRET
env_vars.purpose: Modal cloud token secret

env_vars.name: DAYTONA_API_KEY
env_vars.purpose: Daytona API key for Daytona terminal backend

env_vars.name: VERCEL_TOKEN
env_vars.purpose: Vercel access token for Vercel Sandbox backend

env_vars.name: VERCEL_PROJECT_ID
env_vars.purpose: Vercel project ID for Vercel Sandbox backend

env_vars.name: VERCEL_TEAM_ID
env_vars.purpose: Vercel team ID for Vercel Sandbox backend

env_vars.name: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY
env_vars.purpose: API key for Firecrawl web backend

env_vars.name: SEARXNG_URL
env_vars.purpose: URL for self-hosted SearXNG instance

env_vars.name: TAVILY_API_KEY
env_vars.purpose: API key for Tavily web backend

env_vars.name: EXA_API_KEY
env_vars.purpose: API key for Exa web backend

env_vars.name: HERMES_DOCKER_BINARY
env_vars.purpose: Override Docker binary path (e.g. for Podman)

env_vars.name: MESSAGING_CWD
env_vars.purpose: Working directory for gateway sessions

env_vars.name: TERMINAL_CWD
env_vars.purpose: Working directory for all terminal sessions

env_vars.name: HERMES_YOLO_MODE
env_vars.purpose: Set to 1 to disable all approval prompts

env_vars.name: HERMES_FILE_MUTATION_VERIFIER
env_vars.purpose: Set to 0 to suppress file-mutation verifier footer

env_vars.name: HERMES_LANGUAGE
env_vars.purpose: Override display.language for static messages per-session

env_vars.name: HERMES_API_TIMEOUT
env_vars.purpose: Non-streaming API call timeout in seconds

env_vars.name: HERMES_STREAM_READ_TIMEOUT
env_vars.purpose: Socket read timeout for streaming

env_vars.name: HERMES_STREAM_STALE_TIMEOUT
env_vars.purpose: Stale stream detection timeout

env_vars.name: AUXILIARY_VISION_MODEL
env_vars.purpose: Legacy: override vision model

env_vars.name: AUXILIARY_VISION_PROVIDER
env_vars.purpose: Legacy: override vision provider

env_vars.name: AUXILIARY_WEB_EXTRACT_MODEL
env_vars.purpose: Legacy: override web extract model

env_vars.name: AUXILIARY_WEB_EXTRACT_PROVIDER
env_vars.purpose: Legacy: override web extract provider

config_keys.description: Keep a long-lived bash process for SSH backend
Run container as host user UID/GID
Compress at this fraction of context limit
Max chars a single read_file can return
Append advisory footer when write/patch calls failed
Redact API key patterns in tool output and logs
Per-user session isolation in group chats
Always create a git worktree for CLI sessions

slash_commands.purpose: Cycle tool progress display mode: off→new→all→verbose
Toggle YOLO mode (bypass all approval prompts)

code_examples.caption: Common config set commands
code_examples.code:
hermes config set model anthropic/claude-opus-4
hermes config set terminal.backend docker
hermes config set OPENROUTER_API_KEY sk-or-...

code_examples.caption: Docker backend configuration
code_examples.code:
terminal:
  backend: docker
  docker_image: "nikolaik/python-nodejs:python3.11-nodejs20"
  docker_run_as_host_user: false
  docker_forward_env:
    - "GITHUB_TOKEN"
  container_cpu: 1
  container_memory: 5120

code_examples.caption: Context compression configuration
code_examples.code:
compression:
  enabled: true
  threshold: 0.50
auxiliary:
  compression:
    model: ""
    provider: "auto"

code_examples.caption: Security configuration
code_examples.code:
security:
  tirith_enabled: true
  tirith_fail_open: true
  website_blocklist:
    enabled: false
    domains: []

gotchas: config.yaml wins over .env for non-secret settings; API keys must go in .env
Only ${VAR} syntax is supported for env var substitution in config.yaml — bare $VAR is not expanded
YAML duplicate keys silently override earlier ones — merge docker_volumes into one list
The summary model for compression must have a context window at least as large as the main model
hygiene_hard_message_limit is a gateway-only safety valve; editing it on a running gateway takes effect on next message
container_persistent: true for cloud sandboxes preserves filesystem only — not live processes or PID space
Vercel Sandbox does not support container_disk resizing — leave at the default 51200
docker_run_as_host_user: true prevents apt install in container since root-owned paths become inaccessible
full_text:
# Configuration

# Configuration

All settings are stored in the `~/.hermes/` directory for easy access.

## Directory Structure

```text
~/.hermes/
├── config.yaml     # Settings (model, terminal, TTS, compression, etc.)
├── .env            # API keys and secrets
├── auth.json       # OAuth provider credentials
├── SOUL.md         # Primary agent identity (slot #1 in system prompt)
├── memories/       # Persistent memory (MEMORY.md, USER.md)
├── skills/         # Agent-created skills
├── cron/           # Scheduled jobs
├── sessions/       # Gateway sessions
└── logs/           # Logs (errors.log, gateway.log)
```

## Managing Configuration

```bash
hermes config              # View current configuration
hermes config edit         # Open config.yaml in your editor
hermes config set KEY VAL  # Set a specific value
hermes config check        # Check for missing options
hermes config migrate      # Interactively add missing options

# Examples:
hermes config set model anthropic/claude-opus-4
hermes config set terminal.backend docker
hermes config set OPENROUTER_API_KEY sk-or-...  # Saves to .env
```

## Configuration Precedence

Settings are resolved in this order (highest priority first):

1. **CLI arguments** — per-invocation override
2. **`~/.hermes/config.yaml`** — primary config file
3. **`~/.hermes/.env`** — fallback for env vars; required for secrets
4. **Built-in defaults** — hardcoded safe defaults

## Environment Variable Substitution

```yaml
auxiliary:
  vision:
    api_key: ${GOOGLE_API_KEY}
    base_url: ${CUSTOM_VISION_URL}
```

Only `${VAR}` syntax is supported — bare `$VAR` is not expanded.

## Terminal Backend Configuration

```yaml
terminal:
  backend: local    # local | docker | ssh | modal | daytona | vercel_sandbox | singularity
  cwd: "."
  timeout: 180
  env_passthrough: []
```

| Backend | Where commands run | Best for |
|---------|-------------------|----------|
| **local** | Your machine directly | Development |
| **docker** | Single persistent Docker container | Safe sandboxing |
| **ssh** | Remote server via SSH | Remote dev |
| **modal** | Modal cloud sandbox | Cloud compute |
| **daytona** | Daytona workspace | Cloud dev environments |
| **vercel_sandbox** | Vercel Sandbox | Cloud execution |
| **singularity** | Singularity/Apptainer container | HPC clusters |

### Docker Backend

```yaml
terminal:
  backend: docker
  docker_image: "nikolaik/python-nodejs:python3.11-nodejs20"
  docker_mount_cwd_to_workspace: false
  docker_run_as_host_user: false
  docker_forward_env:
    - "GITHUB_TOKEN"
  docker_volumes:
    - "/home/user/projects:/workspace/projects"
  container_cpu: 1
  container_memory: 5120
  container_disk: 51200
  container_persistent: true
```

### SSH Backend

```yaml
terminal:
  backend: ssh
  persistent_shell: true
```

Required env vars: `TERMINAL_SSH_HOST`, `TERMINAL_SSH_USER`.

### Modal Backend

```yaml
terminal:
  backend: modal
  container_cpu: 1
  container_memory: 5120
  container_disk: 51200
  container_persistent: true
```

Required: `MODAL_TOKEN_ID` + `MODAL_TOKEN_SECRET`.

### Vercel Sandbox Backend

```yaml
terminal:
  backend: vercel_sandbox
  vercel_runtime: node24
  container_persistent: true
```

Required: `VERCEL_TOKEN`, `VERCEL_PROJECT_ID`, `VERCEL_TEAM_ID`.

### Singularity Backend

```yaml
terminal:
  backend: singularity
  singularity_image: "docker://nikolaik/python-nodejs:python3.11-nodejs20"
  container_persistent: true
```

Required: `apptainer` or `singularity` in `$PATH`.

## Memory Configuration

```yaml
memory:
  memory_enabled: true
  user_profile_enabled: true
  memory_char_limit: 2200
  user_char_limit: 1375
```

## File Read Safety

```yaml
file_read_max_chars: 100000  # default ~25-35K tokens
```

## Tool Output Truncation

```yaml
tool_output:
  max_bytes: 50000
  max_lines: 2000
  max_line_length: 2000
```

## Context Compression

```yaml
compression:
  enabled: true
  threshold: 0.50
  target_ratio: 0.20
  protect_last_n: 20
  hygiene_hard_message_limit: 400

auxiliary:
  compression:
    model: ""
    provider: "auto"
    base_url: null
```

## Iteration Budget

```yaml
agent:
  max_turns: 90
  api_max_retries: 3
  reasoning_effort: ""   # none, minimal, low, medium, high, xhigh
  tool_use_enforcement: "auto"
```

## TTS Configuration

```yaml
tts:
  provider: "edge"
  speed: 1.0
  edge:
    voice: "en-US-AriaNeural"
    speed: 1.0
  elevenlabs:
    voice_id: "pNInz6obpgDQGcFmaJgB"
    model_id: "eleven_multilingual_v2"
  openai:
    model: "gpt-4o-mini-tts"
    voice: "alloy"
    speed: 1.0
```

## Display Settings

```yaml
display:
  tool_progress: all      # off | new | all | verbose
  streaming: false
  show_cost: false
  resume_display: full
  bell_on_complete: false
  show_reasoning: false
  file_mutation_verifier: true
  language: en
  runtime_footer:
    enabled: false
    fields: ["model", "context_pct", "cwd"]
```

## Web Search Backends

```yaml
web:
  backend: firecrawl    # firecrawl | searxng | parallel | tavily | exa
  search_backend: "searxng"
  extract_backend: "firecrawl"
```

| Backend | Env Var | Search | Extract | Crawl |
|---------|---------|--------|---------|-------|
| **Firecrawl** (default) | `FIRECRAWL_API_KEY` | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ |
| **SearXNG** | `SEARXNG_URL` | ✔ | — | — |
| **Tavily** | `TAVILY_API_KEY` | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ |
| **Exa** | `EXA_API_KEY` | ✔ | ✔ | — |

## Security

```yaml
security:
  redact_secrets: false
  tirith_enabled: true
  tirith_path: "tirith"
  tirith_timeout: 5
  tirith_fail_open: true
  website_blocklist:
    enabled: false
    domains: []
```

## Approvals

```yaml
approvals:
  mode: manual   # manual | smart | off
```

## Checkpoints

```yaml
checkpoints:
  enabled: false
  max_snapshots: 20
```

## Delegation

```yaml
delegation:
  max_concurrent_children: 3
  max_spawn_depth: 1
  orchestrator_enabled: true
```

## Quick Commands

```yaml
quick_commands:
  status:
    type: exec
    command: systemctl status hermes-agent
  restart:
    type: alias
    target: /gateway restart
```

## Context Files

| File | Purpose | Scope |
|------|---------|-------|
| `SOUL.md` | Primary agent identity | `~/.hermes/SOUL.md` |
| `.hermes.md` / `HERMES.md` | Project-specific instructions (highest priority) | git root walk |
| `AGENTS.md` | Project-specific instructions | directory walk |
| `CLAUDE.md` | Claude Code context files | working directory |
| `.cursorrules` | Cursor IDE rules | working directory |
